title: crotalaria argenteotomentosa subsp. dolosa
intro: Crotalaria argenteotomentosa subsp. dolosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as a legume or pea family plant. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria argenteotomentosa subsp. dolosa include the treatment of fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
